What this means: Total money received from customers
Direct cost of what you sold
Wages and salaries (restaurants: enter separately from OPEX)
Rent + utilities + marketing + admin
Bottom line after ALL expenses

Field: --- CASH POSITION --- Where is your money right now?

What this means: Your bank balance at end of month
Unpaid invoices — cash coming your way
Value of unsold stock. Enter 0 if you are a service business

Field: --- WHAT YOU OWE --- Your short-term obligations

What this means: Bills you have not paid yet
Loans or credit lines due within 12 months
Credit cards + accrued expenses etc.

Field: --- OPENING BALANCES --- Where you started the year (Jan 1st figures)

What this means: Your bank balance on January 1st
What customers owed you on Jan 1st
Stock value on Jan 1st (enter 0 if services)
What you owed suppliers on Jan 1st
Principal paid this month (not interest)
Money you took out for personal use
New equipment + computers + furniture etc.

Field: --- TAX --- VAT or Sales Tax summary

What this means: VAT or Sales Tax you charged customers
VAT or Sales Tax you paid on expenses
